name: Jarvis Configuration Template
description: DEPRECATED — Jarvis no longer ships extends-based framework or library instructions. Initialize targets with docs/stack-scaffolding/ and universal templates under docs/templates/. See docs/stack-scaffolding/legacy-review.md (JR-STACK-007). Decision: JR-LEGACY-003.
usage: Do not copy this file into new projects. Use target docs/stack/stack-profile.md, docs/stack/upstream-references.md, and .cursor/rules/ authored per docs/stack-scaffolding/selection.md.

project-specific-rules: Add target-project rules in the target repository .cursor/rules/, not via Jarvis extends.
